name: MOS / Office for Foreigners (Urząd do Spraw Cudzoziemców)
description: The national portal and office handling residence legalization for foreigners in Poland.

name: Voivodeship office (urząd wojewódzki)
description: The regional office where residence applications are processed and decided by the voivode.

name: ZUS — Social Insurance Institution (Zakład Ubezpieczeń Społecznych)
description: The institution handling social insurance: sickness benefit, rehabilitation benefit, pensions, and related forms.

name: eZUS / PUE — ZUS electronic services platform
description: ZUS's online platform where insured persons see e-ZLA sick notes and can submit applications electronically.

name: Poviat Labour Office (powiatowy urząd pracy)
description: The local office where you register as unemployed or as a jobseeker.

name: Public Employment Services (Publiczne Służby Zatrudnienia)
description: The national employment services network and portal.

name: Ministry of Family, Labour and Social Policy
description: The ministry responsible for labour-market and social policy, publishing on gov.pl.

name: Employer
description: Your current or former employer, responsible for employment documents such as świadectwo pracy.

name: Labour court (sąd pracy)
description: The court handling employment disputes, for example about a certificate of employment.

name: Doctor / treating physician
description: Issues e-ZLA sick notes and medical certificates such as OL-9.

name: Hospital
description: Provides hospital treatment and issues discharge documentation.

name: SOR — hospital emergency department (szpitalny oddział ratunkowy)
description: The hospital emergency department, for sudden threats to life or health.

name: pacjent.gov.pl / IKP (Internetowe Konto Pacjenta)
description: The official patient portal, with access to electronic medical documentation.

name: NFZ — National Health Fund (Narodowy Fundusz Zdrowia)
description: The public health-insurance fund financing healthcare in Poland.

name: Private insurer
description: The insurance company behind an individual or employer-provided group policy.

name: Rzecznik Finansowy (Financial Ombudsman)
description: Assists customers of financial institutions, including insurance complaints.

name: Ministry of Finance
description: Responsible for insurance-market regulation and policyholder-protection policy.

name: KNF — Polish Financial Supervision Authority
description: Supervises the financial market, including insurance companies.

name: University or school
description: Issues admission and enrolment certificates used in study-related residence procedures.

name: gov.pl
description: The central Polish government portal, including the Your Europe in Poland section.
